name: productflow-sso-followups
title: ProductFlow SSO Followups - Startup WARN and Deployment Mode Doc
description: Minor new-api follow-ups discovered during the 2026-05-23 grill-me audit of ProductFlow's image.aync.cc.cd hardening. Adds one startup WARN when the in-memory ticket fallback is in play under productflow_sso config, and a deployment-mode section to the SSO contract spec.
creator: name
notes: Sibling task to ProductFlow's multitenant-hardening work. Scope is intentionally tiny so it lands as a separate PR.
